banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock applicant: Aroha Ngata, a 32-year-old New Zealander applying for a first RealMe verified identity, relying on her own (unexpired) New Zealand passport, completing the photo/identity check online herself, and not requiring an identity referee (DIA determines referee necessity; this scenario models the common case where none is requested). All names, numbers, and dates below are fabricated test data, not a real applicant's information. No live walkthrough of the application itself was performed — see VERIFICATION.md for why (it sits behind an authenticated RealMe login this environment cannot pass without genuine identity documents).
